data.name: Queens Climax
data.detailed_description:
The story of Queens Climax begins on Princess Crystelle's 18th birthday in the Kingdom of Brighton. It was a celebration. However, little did the people know their time of happiness would be violently cut short. A discrete band of assassins infiltrated the unsuspecting castle and wiped out the entire royal family—except for one.

Kidnapped and enslaved, Princess Crystelle, must make her way through Valenhein Castle and its inhabitants to find her way out of the twisted grip of Queen Renea!

Imps, Orcs, and Minotaurs, oh my! From dungeons to gardens, the captured Crystelle must escape her cell and sexually satisfy the citizens of Valenhein until she finds a way out.

CHARACTERS

Princess Crystelle: Pure, submissive, and empathetic, the newly eighteen-year-old loved her people in every sense of the word. She would not wish ill on anyone, nor would she have her parents killed and her kingdom conquered. 

Queen Renea: Lustful, chaotic, and malicious. The newly-turned Queen rules with her latest whim. Sleeping with whom she wishes and cursing who she desires. Can a woman who is always right be wronged? Well, if so... A wise man once said, "Hell hath no fury like a woman scorned."

  • Animated characters and NSFW scenes!

  • 7 Locations in Valenheim Castle to explore! 

  • Dialogue choices turn enemies into your friends (or not) and change the story!

  • Memorable soundtrack.

  • Story and characters that will have your heart melting or raging with satisfaction!

data.short_description: Queens Climax is a beautiful or cruel 2D erotic visual novel where a kidnapped and enslaved princess, is thrown into a kingdom of darkness. Win the hearts of your enemies through seduction and escape or descend into the twisted grasp of your captor, Queen Renea!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
